caption: A man with short brown hair and a beard is situated in a recording studio, wearing a grey shirt and black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone with a pop filter and a black arm stand, set against a background of dark, vertically ribbed acoustic panels. In the first frame, a black rectangular overlay is visible, featuring the white text "THE WINE LINE" and smaller, illegible text above and below. As the sequence progresses, this overlay becomes a plain black rectangle without text. The man maintains a similar posture throughout, glancing slightly upward and to his right with a neutral expression. The lighting and setting remain constant, with only the appearance of the on-screen graphic changing across the frames.
